name: esp-cryptoauth-utility

metadata.name: esp-cryptoauth-utility
metadata.summary: A python utility which helps to configure and provision ATECC608 chip connected to an ESP module

documentation:
# esp-cryptoauth-utility

The python utility helps to configure and provision ATECC608 chip connected to an ESP module. Currently the utility is supported for ESP32, ESP32S3, ESP32C3, ESP32C5 and ESP32C6.

The esp-cryptoauth-utility is [hosted on github](https://github.com/espressif/esp-cryptoauthlib/tree/master/esp_cryptoauth_utility).

## Documentation

Visit online [esp-cryptoauth-utility documentation](https://github.com/espressif/esp-cryptoauthlib/tree/master/esp_cryptoauth_utility#readme/) or run `secure_cert_mfg.py -h`.

## License

The License for the project can be found [here](https://github.com/espressif/esp-cryptoauthlib/blob/master/esp_cryptoauth_utility/LICENSE)

classes.name: helper_scripts.serial.cmd_interpreter
documentation:
This class is for is the command line interaction with the secure_cert_mfg firmware for manufacturing.
It executes the specified commands and returns its result.
It is a stateless, thus does not maintain the current state of the firmware.
